name: HRC_CONSOLE_FAULT_DETAILS_VL
query: SELECT HCFD.FAULT_DETAILS_ID, HCFD.ISSUE_TYPE_CODE, HCFDTL.ISSUE_TYPE, HCFDTL.ISSUE_TITLE, HCFDTL.DESCRIPTION, HCFDTL.RESOLUTION, HCFD.ENTERPRISE_ID, HCFD.CREATED_BY, HCFD.CREATION_DATE, HCFD.LAST_UPDATED_BY, HCFD.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, HCFD.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, HCFD.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, HCFD.FAULT_CODE, HCFD.ERROR_CODE, HCFD.INTERNAL_CODE, HCFD.SGUID, HCFD.MODULE_ID FROM HRC_CONSOLE_FAULT_DETAILS_B HCFD, HRC_CONSOLE_FAULT_DETAILS_TL HCFDTL WHERE HCFD.FAULT_DETAILS_ID = HCFDTL.FAULT_DETAILS_ID AND HCFDTL.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
